name: afu-brain-public-rag
description: Public shared-cognition RAG packs for Afu Brain decision routing.

packs.purpose: Hard safety rules, risk upgrades, and approval gates.
Request-to-skill routing cases for tool-using agents.
Examples of private preferences turned into operational parameters.
Long-term interaction feedback, correction, uptake, and persona signals.
Evidence patterns for safety claims, red-team cases, and release boundaries.
Lagged parameter-to-behavior audit patterns for continuously self-updating agents.
Reasoning seeds for ranking, doubt, observation, and counterexamples.
File vault retrieval, search audit, pagination, and confirmation boundaries for tool-using agents.
